de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews

Class HTMLSyntaxHighlighter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews.HTMLSyntaxHighlighter

  • public class HTMLSyntaxHighlighter
extends Object
    Performs a simple pattern-based syntax highlighting for KeY sequents by adding styled HTML tags.

    The main method is process(String, Node).

    NOTE: There should be a more elegant and stable way to achieve this, e.g. by creating a specialized LogicPrinter. However, this is a very involved job to do since all kinds of changes would have to performed to other classes, for instance to maintain a correct position table in the sequent view.

    Author:
    Dominic Scheurer

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      private static interface  HTMLSyntaxHighlighter.StringTransformer
      Simple interface as a replacement for a lambda realizing a String transformation.

    • Constructor Detail

      • HTMLSyntaxHighlighter

        public HTMLSyntaxHighlighter(HTMLDocument document)
        Creates a new HTMLSyntaxHighlighter for this HTMLDocument.
        Parameters:
        document - The HTMLDocument of the parent JEditorPane. Used to add CSS rules.

    • Method Detail

      • process

        public String process(String plainTextString,
             Node displayedNode)
        Computes a String for the given plain text where HTML elements have been escaped and syntax highlighting has been added.
        Parameters:
        plainTextString - The String to add syntax highlighting to.
        displayedNode - The node the sequent of which should be augmented with syntax highlighting.
        Returns:
        A HTML version of the input String with added syntax highlighting.

      • addSyntaxHighlighting

        private String addSyntaxHighlighting(String htmlString,
                           Iterable<? extends ProgramVariable> programVariables)
        Adds syntax highlighting to the given HTML String.
        Parameters:
        htmlString - The HTML String to add syntax highlighting tags to.
        programVariables - The program variables to highlight.
        Returns:
        The input String augmented by syntax highlighting tags.

      • toHTML

        private static String toHTML(String plainTextString)
        Shortcut for LogicPrinter.escapeHTML(String, boolean).
        Parameters:
        plainTextString - The String to transform.
        Returns:
        A HTML-compatible version of plainTextString.

      • concat

        private static String concat(String delim,
            Iterable<? extends Object> strings)
        Concatenates the given String array where the elements are separated by the given delimiter in the result String.
        Parameters:
        delim - Delimiter for the elements in the array.
        strings - Strings to concatenate.
        Returns:
        The concatenated array, elements separated by the given delimiter.

      • concat

        private static String concat(String delim,
            Iterable<? extends Object> strings,
            HTMLSyntaxHighlighter.StringTransformer strTransformer)
        Concatenates the given String array where the elements are separated by the given delimiter in the result String.
        Parameters:
        delim - Delimiter for the elements in the array.
        strings - Strings to concatenate.
        strTransformer - Transformation applied to the input Strings before the concatenation is performed.
        Returns:
        The concatenated array, elements separated by the given delimiter.

      • concat

        public static String concat(String... strings)
        Concatenates the given Strings using a StringBuilder.
        Parameters:
        strings - Strings to concatenate.
        Returns:
        The concatenated Strings.
